faqs.question: What pests are most common in Jackson Heights apartments and homes?
faqs.answer: Jackson Heights residents most frequently deal with cockroaches, mice, rats, ants, and bed bugs due to the area's dense housing and active commercial districts. Our general pest control service targets these common pests with treatments customized for multi-family buildings and co-op apartments typical of the neighborhood.

faqs.question: How much does general pest control cost in Jackson Heights?
faqs.answer: Our general pest control services in Jackson Heights range from $175 to $300, depending on the size of your home, severity of infestation, and type of pests. We provide upfront pricing with no hidden fees and can offer customized treatment plans for co-op boards and multi-unit buildings.

faqs.question: Are your pest control treatments safe for families and pets in Jackson Heights homes?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-approved products and pet-safe treatment methods that are effective against pests while minimizing risk to your family and pets. Our technicians are trained in the latest application techniques and will provide specific safety instructions based on the treatments used in your Jackson Heights home.
